title: Yorn Skot mining station
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{City |image= |name=Yorn Skot mining station |constructed= |destroyed= |rebuilt= |builder= |mayor= |celestialbody=[[Yorn Skot]][[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 1]] |continent= |location= |climate= |interest= |population=Thousands[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 2]] |demonym= |affiliation=*[[Clode Rhoden]] {{C|formerly}} *[[Saul Moegantz]] }} {{Quote|So by destroying the station, you hope to reap the ''insurance benefits''.''"
"''I got debts, ya know.|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and Clode Rhoden|}} '''Yorn Skot mining station''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yorn Skot]]. Founded by wealthy [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas magnate [[Clode Rhoden]], it was the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant's]]{{CSWECite|III|358|Yorn Skot}} main colony{{CSWECite|III|99|Rhoden, Clode}} and had a population numbering in the thousands. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]],{{CSWECite|III|322|Waverton}} dates the [[Aurorient Express crisis|''Aurorient Express'' crisis]] to six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. As ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the Battle of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], it can be assumed that the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'' crisis took place in [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]]. Rhoden's [[Rhoden|wife]] was having an affair with Buck, a member of the [[Green Forge]] eco-terrorist group, and together they plotted to collect on Clode's insurance policy. To that effect, they [[Aurorient Express crisis|planted]] a [[core bomb]] aboard Rhoden's [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]], the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'', with the intent of using it to destroy Yorn Skot mining station with Clode aboard. However, he learned of their plan and had their bomb moved to his wife's [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] and reprogrammed its trajectory to collide with the mining colony, which would allow him to both collect the insurance money and kill his cheating wife. However, his plot was thwarted when the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Unidentified Aurorient Express captain|captain]] detonated the bomb early to avoid endangering the innocent bystanders aboard Yorn Skot mining station. Ultimately, Rhoden lost the mining colony to [[Saul Moegantz]], who claimed it to cover Clode's [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] debts. ==Appearances== *[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 1]] {{1stm}} *[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 2]] {{Mo}} {{1stID|Yorn Skot mining station}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Mining stations]]
